The parameters are the x and y coordinates, width, and height. - DrawRectangle: Draws the rectangle on the image. The parameters are the color, the rectangle, and the thickness of the rectangle's border. - Mutate: Applies the drawing operation to the image. - Save: Saves the modified image to a file. texts.full_text: he ratio between LO and Control. These findings clearly suggested neurotoxicity after exposure to PAHs mixtures. They also indicated that effects were different depending on the mixture used and indeed DA and 5HT concentrations in PY brains were not different from Control albeit a trend to a decrease in 5HT was observed. In previous studies only acute exposures to individual compounds (BaP, β-naphthoflavone or naphthalene) have been performed and therefore comparison with previous work is not straightforward. However, it has been shown that, in rat, acute exposure to BaP (intra-peritoneal (ip) injection; 50 mg·kg^−1^; maximum duration 96 h) decreased DA in forebrain and NA in forebrain and midbrain \[[@B36-ijms-18-00560]\]. In another study performed with BaP in rat (three times i.p. injection; 10 mg·kg^−1^; ≤24 h), variations of DA concentrations depended on the brain regions considered with an increase in the hippocampus and a decrease in the caudate putamen while the ratio DOPAC/DA was increased in the caudate putamen and the nucleus accumbens \[[@B37-ijms-18-00560]\]. In rainbow trout, acute exposure to BaP (i.p. injection; 10 mg·kg^−1^; ≤72 h) produced a decrease in 5HT in several regions of the brain \[[@B21-ijms-18-00560]\] while exposure to naphthalene (i.p. injection; 10--50 mg kg^−1^; ≤120 h) produced an increase or a decrease in DA and 5HT depending on brain regions \[[@B23-ijms-18-00560]\]. In these reports, monoamine concentrations remained unchanged in other brain areas. The munitions industry earned the label “merchants of death,” which was also the title of a best selling book advancing the theory of Wall Street conniving to get the country into war. Nye earned lasting Democratic scorn for attacking Woodrow Wilson. Nye accused the former president of being less than honest about why the country had gone to war in 1917. The Nye committee, with Alger Hiss serving as counsel for a time and with prominent members like Sen. Arthur Vandenberg, gave momentum to those, like Borah, who favored neutrality legislation and a general withdrawal from European affairs. As a reliable vote for any manner of New Deal legislation, including FDR’s controversial court packing scheme in 1937, Pope’s political standing in Idaho, particularly compared to Borah, suffered near the end of his only term. The Idaho Democratic Party was also fractious, with Pope clearly at home in the liberal wing of the party. When a more conservative Democrat, popular eastern Idaho Congressman D. Worth Clark, challenged Pope for the Democratic nomination in 1938, Clark won. Clark’s foreign policy views were much more in line with Borah than Pope had ever been. Still, even with defeat for re-election to the Senate, Pope’s political career was far from over. In 1939, Roosevelt appointed Pope to be a director of the Tennessee Valley Authority, a position he held until 1951. texts.full_text: cularly, relates to a system for improving the accuracy and resolution of an analog to digital converter. Digital processing of analog signals becomes an increasingly attractive alternative to analog processing as digital hardware becomes increasingly faster, more sophisticated, and more integrated. Also, digital systems are, in general, inherently more flexible and less sensitive to time and temperature than analog systems and can simulate almost ideal linear systems. As a result, a great effort has gone into the development of analog to digital converters (ADC's) and digital to analog converters (DAC's) for transforming an analog signal to a digital representation of that signal, or vice versa, The use cases derived from such transformation have broad applications across various fields including automotive systems where accuracy in real-time sensing is critical; medical devices requiring precise measurement and control over biological signals within the human body. As both consumer electronics become more technologically advanced to accommodate user-driven advancements for a seamless computing experience, ADC's play an indispensable role by converting subtle physical changes into discrete digital data that can be processed rapidly. One area where there is significant scope of improvement in analog-to-digital converters lies within their noise performance. In current technology standardization and component manufacturing process constraints exist to limit the extent at which small variations or random signals, commonly known as "noise", manifest themselves during conversion from an actual physical signal (such that found on a membrane sensor) into digital data. A novel system proposed in this invention intends thusly: it draws upon state-of-the-art quantum processes and multi-scale interference suppression techniques to substantially enhance the noise reduction capabilities of ADCs. The fundamental premise is by maximizing usage, phase correlation filtering process for signal de-phasement inside each sampling period improves resolution from both quantization errors as well inherent random nature non-random physical variables related. Just days after mixing was completed, PRONG went on the road with Danzig and SuperJoint Ritual in North America and released the first single "Ultimate Authority" on the day the tour began. "X – No Absolutes" is PRONG at their very best. The sheer intensity and ferocity of the albums opening triumvirate "Ultimate Authority", "Sense Of Ease" and "Without Words" leaves the listener gasping for air. The title track is crunchy and catchy at the same time. "Do Nothing" may be as close as you will ever hear PRONG get to a ballad and shows the enormous progress and confidence Victor has made vocally. It is hard to find a weak spot here, notably Victor mentions that "sequencing the album was a difficult task; every song is so strong in it's own way". So today DraftKings is launching Leagues, a feature to make it easier to play daily fantasy sports with your friends. To understand the significance of Leagues it’s helpful to first understand the different between DraftKing’s daily fantasy sports product, and traditional fantasy sports. Traditional fantasy sports have been a thing for decades – and consist of a group of people each drafting a team of professional players at the beginning of the season, and keeping that team throughout the season. In comparison, daily fantasy sports have surgein popularity in the last 10 years, and consist of a group of people each drafting a team of professional players for a single game. In daily fantasy sports, the team is disbanded and the players are free to be used in the next game. This is the game that DraftKings is in, and the game that the new Leagues feature is for. texts.full_text: Run raises awareness about the prevalence of hunger for the more than 900,000 working families, seniors, veterans and children in our community who struggle with food insecurity. Each year, 755,000 people are given the food assistance they desperately need through the Atlanta Community Food Bank’s network of more than 600 partner agencies. In 2017, the Food Bank distributed 70.4 million meals to those in need. The Hunger Walk Run is open to participants of all ages and fitness levels. The event offers a timed 5K run for competitive athletes as well as a leisurely walk through Atlanta's iconic sports stadium. In addition to the main event, there will be activities for children and families such as face painting, games, music, and opportunities to learn more about hunger relief efforts in the community. "The Hunger Walk Run is not just an opportunity to get active and support a good cause," said Kyle Waide, president and CEO of the Atlanta Community Food Bank. This target will also be met if current trends continue History On Sunday 7 August 2016, a combination of high wind and low consumption caused more wind power generation (106%) than consumption in Scotland. texts.full_text: TEs reside within genes whose sequences are translated into DNA and can require alternative splicing, thereby creating new genes with possibly novel functions; a range of instances have been described where such activities occur in normal growth or disorder [ 6 , 7 ]. For instance: the insertion of LINE s L1 (LINE-2) genes within intronic sequences is correlated also (~80%) with disruption/interruption/termination signals for DNA polymerase III, thereby producing truncated transcripts that are processed into siRNA and miRNAs [ https://www.jstage.com/article/ggs/5/3/_pdf ]. Epigenetics can be described as the analysis of genetic alterations in protein function or molecular phenotype which occur without a change to underlying RNA sequences. While this originally referred solely/mostly (i.e., historically) with regard to modern genetics, more recent developments have allowed genes correlated with such phenomena at both genic and extragenomic levels [ 8 ]. texts.full_text: target audience before you can offer this type of service. If they’re a non-profit, their website probably needs a way to donate, a way to volunteer, and a design that helps visitors get clear on the mission right away. If your clients are small business owners, they probably need a clear outline of their services, and a way for visitors to book their services. Get really familiar with your clients’ goals and needs, and list out what their website should include. Then template it. With a low price point, you can’t afford to spend two months (or more) working on a custom website for each client. But you CAN choose an amazing WordPress theme, swap out a few colors, add your client’s logo and some free stock images, put in the necessary features, and get them launched. Instead of taking months to get your client’s new site into the world, you can take a day (or up to a week) and get them online. This means you can work with more clients, and make the money that you need to make, while giving your clients what they need at a price they can afford. Just be really, really clear about what’s included and what’s not, and that any additions outside of your pre-determined package will cost extra. This way you can keep your sanity, while serving a market without a lot of cash. Target clients with more money, and donate your services to those you’re passionate about helping If selling a bunch of templated websites isn’t your thing, that’s okay. You can still help those you want to help. Target clients with money. Restructure your business, re-position yourself, and get those high-paying clients. The companies are launching their "NFC Pay" application, which enables users to make contactless purchases at any merchant accepting Visa or Visa. The announcement comes as Apple begins its push into the electronic wallets market with the release of the iPhone 6 and 6 Plus. With NFC technology built in to both models, there's no doubt that these phones will be a huge hit with customers looking for more affordable ways to pay their bills. C-SAM is recognized across India as one of the leading mobile wallet companies on the continent. They have developed many apps over the years including the "NFC Pay" app which has recently been launched in Japan. The company also launched an NFC-enabled prepaid card, called C-Prepaid, that can be used at any point-of-sale (POS) terminal accepting Visa or Visa. The prepaid card is available in Singapore and will later expand to other countries throughout Europe. Mastercard's new partnership with C-SAM will help the company reach more customers across the globe while also allowing them access to one of the most popular digital wallet apps on the market. texts.full_text: that offers an overview about the TIMN framework, its system dynamics, and some future implications. It was filmed at my home in order to enable a presentation about TIMN at recent Highlands Forum meetings, after I demurred about traveling to participate in them. The presentation proceeds in three segments. Segment One is about how TIMN got started. It provides background and a basic description of TIMN. Segment Two is about how TIMn works. It relates my sense of TIMN’s system dynamics, emphasizing general propositions that hold across the evolution of social organization from tribes to hierarchical institutions or markets/networks based on different conditions such as resource availability (TIM) and strategic interactions between individuals within a population who are adapting in response environmental changes over time. This segment also discusses how these principles apply at various scales, ranging geographically large-scale societies down through smaller communities up close enough for individual interaction among humans living together today Segment Three delves into future implications

texts.full_text: The recipe combines lentils, green beans, and garbanzo beans with rice and olive oil, requiring an overnight soak to tenderize the legumes. Simmering the mixture slowly transforms it into a velvety, unctuous broth—a culinary equivalent of a long bath. The method balances effort and ease, mirroring the dish’s purpose: to restore equilibrium after life’s turbulence. While Farah’s version streamlines steps, the core remains unchanged: nourishment through tradition, patience, and the alchemy of time. Makhluta - AdApted from the Beirut RestaurAnts recipe with additional inspiration from a recipe in Lebanese Cuisine by Madelain Farah (on page 32 in Google preview). Serves 6 generously. Ingredients 2 quarts richly flavored and moderately salted vegetable stock 1 cup brown rice (use quick-cooking for faster results) 1/2 cup virgin olive

texts.full_text: Then is $R$ Noetherian ? If not, then is it true at least in the local case ? Without reduced assumption, it is not true even in local case, although it is true when the ring is an integral domain; see this previous question. NOTE : All our rings are commutative with unity. A: Question: Let $R$ be a reduced ring with all non-prime ideals finitely generated. Then is $R$ Noetherian? The answer is Yes. To lessen my typing, let me use the abbreviation NFG to mean not-finitely-generated. The result proved here is Theorem. If $R$ is a commutative unital ring whose NFG ideals are prime, then $R$ has at most one NFG ideal. If one exists, it is a nonmaximal, nonzero prime which squares to zero. [In particular, a reduced, commutative, unital ring whose NFG ideals are prime is Noetherian.] Throughout the rest of this post $R$ always denotes a commutative, unital ring whose NFG ideals are prime. March 8, 2017 March 8, 2017 2 Comments Beginner Piano, Music Books, Uncategorized Hymn Favorites Collection One (and Giveaway!) Today, I’m excited to announce the start of a new music seris for pianists new to the genre. Hymn Favorites Collection One is a curated set designed to help beginners and intermediate players explore classic hymns in a simplified yet musically rewarding format. From "Amazing Grace" to "How Great Thou Art," this collection includes 10 beloved hymns with easy-to-read arrangements and helpful fingerings. Plus, each piece comes with a short story about the hymn's history or the author’s experience learning it—because I firmly believe that understanding the "why" behind the music enriches the playing experience. To celebrate the launch, I’m giving away a ! Simply comment below with your favorite hymn (and why it matters to you), and I’ll pick a winner next week. Whether you're teaching yourself to play, working with a student, or just revisiting old favorites, this collection aims to bring joy back to the bench. For those who prefer physical books, you can purchase the spiral-bound version here. And don’t worry—whatever your preferred learning style, both formats come with performance MP3s and backing tracks to help you master dynamics and pacing. texts.full_text: a custom `dist_info` command for a Python package, which is similar to the `egg_info` command but tailored to create a `.dist-info` directory as defined in the wheel specification. Here's a completion of the `run` method and the rest of the class to ensure it functions correctly: ```python import os import shutil from distutils.core import Command from distutils import log from distutils.command.egg_info import egg_info class dist_info(Command): description = 'create a .dist-info directory' user_options = [ ('egg-base=', 'e', "directory containing .egg-info directories" " (default: top of the source tree)"), ] def initialize_options(self): self.egg_base = None def finalize_options(self): if self.egg_base is None: self.egg_base = os.curdir def run(self): # Run the egg_info command to generate the .egg-info directory egg_info = self.get_finalized_command('egg_info') egg_info.egg_base = self.egg_base egg_info.run() # Get the path to the .egg-info directory egg_info_dir = egg_info.egg_info # Determine the name of the .dist-info directory # This should be in the format: <project_name>-<version>.dist-info metadata = egg_info.read_metadata_files() project_name =

texts.full_text: s with low-flying cruise missiles and by deploying far more submarine-launched missiles tipped with MIrVs, or multiple warheads that split into independent trajectories to hit many targets".[3] Nuclear missilesEdit Brown considered it essential to maintain the triad of ICBMs, SLBMs, and strategic bombers; some of the administration's most important decisions on weapon systems reflected this commitment. Although he decided not to produce the B-1 bomber, he did recommend upgrading existing B-52s and equipping them with air-launched cruise missiles, and gave the go-ahead for development of a "stealth" technology, fostered by William J. Perry, under-secretary of defense for research and engineering, that would make it possible to produce planes (bombers as well as other aircraft) with very low radar profiles, presumably able to elude enemy defenses and deliver weapons on targets. The administration backed development of the MX missile, intended to replace in the 1980s the increasingly vulnerable Minuteman and Titan intercontinental missiles. to insure MX survivability, Brown recommended deploying the missiles in "multiple protective shelters"; 200 MX missiles would be placed in Utah and Nevada, with each missile to be shuttled among 23 different shelters of its own located along roadways-meaning a total of 4,600 such shelters.

But this one was different because Bob actually spoke while singing - something else entirely! So I am as pleased as punch at the news that Mr. Zimmerman has been awarded a Nobel Prize for Literature, but it does beg two questions: (1) is there any other musician or poet whose work will be read in 50 years from now? and (2), if you are going to give out awards like this why not also consider giving one posthumously--say at least within five decades of death-to Jimi Hendrix, John Lennon,, Jim Morrison ? And while Dylan is clearly worthy based on his vast body of work over the past 50 years which include Blowin' In The Wind (1963), A Hard Rain's Gonna Fall(also '62) along with Tangled Up Blue ('74). But do they really need Nobel Prizes for literature? Yes! That way we can honor those who have contributed so much to our culture and society as well. So here is the thing: Dylan isn’t just some guy playing guitar on stage anymore; he's now part of history thanks partly because that song from 1965 “You Ain’t Going Nowhere” still rings true today (and will likely continue doing so until we find ourselves back where everything started).
